meta.title: ExtremeIbiza | Luxury Concierge Services
meta.description: Premium concierge services in Ibiza. VIP tables, luxury villas, yacht charters, supercars, and bespoke experiences. 15 years of excellence.

vipTables.title: VIP Tables
vipTables.description: Priority access to Pacha, Amnesia, Ushuaïa, Hï Ibiza and all top venues

villas.title: Luxury Villas
villas.description: Exclusive properties with direct access. Sea views, pools, privacy

yachts.title: Yacht Charters
yachts.description: Day cruises, sunset sails, Formentera trips. All sizes available

supercars.title: Supercar Hire
supercars.description: Ferrari, Lamborghini, Porsche, Bentley, Rolls-Royce and more

transfers.title: Private Transfers
transfers.description: Mercedes V-Class, shuttle service, airport pickups

dining.title: Private Dining
dining.description: Personal chefs, exclusive reservations, beach setups

jets.title: Private Jets
jets.description: Private flights to Ibiza. VIP arrivals and departures

difference.quote: We have the keys to every door in Ibiza.
difference.subquote: Direct relationships, insider access, and 100% local expertise.
difference.text: Our team lives on the island. We know every villa, every captain, every club manager personally. When you work with us, you get the real Ibiza experience.

chat.title: ExtremeIbiza Concierge
chat.welcome:
Welcome to ExtremeIbiza!

I'm here to help plan your perfect Ibiza experience. With 15 years on the island, we have direct access to the best villas, clubs, yachts, and cars.

What's your name?
chat.whenVisit:
When are you planning to visit Ibiza?
(e.g., "June 15-22" or "first week of August")
chat.howMany: How many people will be in your group?
chat.whichServices:
Which services are you interested in?
Select all that apply:
chat.budget: What's your approximate budget for this trip?
chat.specialRequests:
Any special requests?
(celebrations, dietary needs, specific requests)

Type your message or skip:
chat.howContact: How would you like us to contact you?
chat.whatsappNumber:
What's your WhatsApp number?
(include country code, e.g., +44 7911 123456)
chat.thankYou: Click above to send your request. We'll get back to you within 24 hours with personalized options!
